data.title: Hanwha Power Systems and PSM unite as Hanwha Power, a global compressor and gas turbine business
data.description: The newly merged corporation aims to boost its presence in international energy sectors such as power plants and data centers. Based in SEOUL, South Korea, the consolidation involves Hanwha Impact's entities - Hanwha Power Systems and PSM (Power Systems Mfg., LLC), an American gas turbine service provider. Established on March 24, 2026, the move is set to facilitate their expansion strategy, targeting key global markets and propelling growth.

data.title: Iran permits non-hostile ships to navigate through the Strait of Hormuz, excluding those linked to Israel or US. Vessels may attempt passage.
data.description: The government announced that ships not affiliated with Israel or the United States will be permitted to proceed, although it remains uncertain if any ships will attempt to do so.

data.title: Hope Medicine Announces First Patient Dosed in the Phase III Clinical Trial for Endometriosis
data.description: In Shanghai on March 24, 2026, Hope Medicine Inc., a research-centered biopharmaceutical company at the clinical development stage, disclosed that the Phase III clinical trial for its novel monoclonal antibody HMI-115, possessing worldwide rights, has initiated with the dosing of the first participant.

data.title: Avia Establishes Global Trust Center in Singapore
data.description: AviaGames has unveiled its Global Trust Center in Singapore to enhance security and data protection for players engaging in its array of skill-based, real-money games. Dr. Jan Wang, appointed as Chief Information Security Officer, will spearhead the center. With a background in security leadership at renowned companies like AWS, Dr. Wang aims to establish a top-tier cybersecurity unit and drive cutting-edge strategies to safeguard users. The initiative marks a significant step towards ensuring a secure gaming environment for the company's global player base.

data.title: Digital Realty Delivers Colocation Infrastructure Support to Samsung Electronics in Seoul
data.description: Today in Seoul, South Korea, Digital Realty (NYSE: DLR) revealed that it has partnered with Samsung Electronics, providing enterprise-grade data center infrastructure at its ICN10 data center. As the world’s leading cloud- and carrier-neutral data center platform, Digital Realty aims to bolster Samsung Electronics’ enterprise IT operations with reliable and scalable colocation infrastructure. This collaboration signifies a significant step forward in enhancing technological capabilities, underscoring the importance of robust data management systems in today's digital landscape.

data.title: Faircourt Asset Management Inc. Announces March Distribution
data.description: In Toronto, Ontario, as of March 24, 2026, Faircourt Asset Management Inc. has disclosed the monthly distribution that will be paid on Shares of the Faircourt Fund (CBOE: FGX). Investors can anticipate the distribution of this Fund in the upcoming period.
